attempts.reflection: You repeatedly tried to craft a wooden pickaxe without first obtaining enough sticks and oak planks. Specifically, you needed to ensure you had at least 2 sticks and 3 oak planks before attempting to craft the wooden pickaxe. Additionally, you should have avoided mining actions until you had the necessary tools and materials. Correct the order by first crafting sticks and oak planks, then creating the wooden pickaxe.

attempts.reflection:
You failed to craft the piston because you did not have the necessary resources and tools at the right time. Specifically, you lacked an iron pickaxe to mine cobblestone and iron ore, and you did not smelt the iron ore into iron ingots to craft an iron pickaxe. Additionally, you did not have enough coal to smelt the iron ore into iron ingots. 

To successfully craft a piston, first, craft an iron pickaxe by smelting iron ore into iron ingots and using them along with sticks. Ensure you have at least one iron pickaxe before attempting to mine cobblestone and iron ore. Then, use the iron pickaxe to mine iron ore, smelt it into iron ingots, and craft the iron pickaxe if needed. Finally, craft the piston with the required items: sticky piston, redstone, and iron ingot.
